architecture.summary: derivePluginName() in slug.ts extracts plugin folder from path. publishSkill() sets pluginName. backfill-slugs populates legacy. CLI find.ts displays badge. No new services.

integrations.summary: N/A - no external services, purely internal slug derivation and metadata

performance.summary: N/A - adding one string metadata field, no performance impact

security.summary: N/A - backfill uses existing admin auth (X-Internal-Key or SUPER_ADMIN JWT), no new auth surface

ui-ux.summary: Raw plugin folder name as teal pill badge. Detail page: byline row after repo link. CLI: dim bracketed suffix on same line. No links, purely informational.

edge-cases.summary: Non-plugin skills return null pluginName. Backfill skips null skillPath silently. Flat names must always be converted to hierarchical format.
